boat.name: Mary Ellen
boat.full_description: She had been based in Gosport, Lymington, Beaulieu and Salcombe before being purchased in a very poor, virtually derelict, condition in 1996 by Graham Mackenzie. He restored her to a seaworthy condition over the following two years. The entire plywood structure, exterior and interior, aft of the mast was replaced and that forward required heavy repairs as well.
boat.construction_details: GRP hull with sheathed plywood deck/coachroof.
boat.short_description: We understand from the first owner that this boat was exhibited at the 1977 Earls Court Boat Show, prior to delivery.
